title: Google's FREE AI Marketing Tool!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

Attention Marketers & Small Businesses! Google just launched Pomelli (from Google Labs and DeepMind), a new AI tool to revolutionize your social media! Just enter your website, and Pomelli creates your "Business DNA" (tone, colors, visuals). It then generates scalable, professional, and perfectly on-brand campaigns, from captions to images in minutes!
